notes: No new PropertySource entries could be extracted. The cite_traverse corpus is dominated by SST/OLM, IS, CCK basket, and ivy/neurogliaform papers. The only paper mentioning AIS (CID 195584607 / PMID:31297048) discusses CCK basket cells NOT targeting AIS, which is indirect evidence only. Papers already in existing refs (PMID:33398060/CID:230508306 on PV transcriptomic continuity; PMID:37467748/CID:259953057 review covering AAC) were the primary axo-axonic sources but are excluded as duplicates.
